case.title: MISSOURI, K & T R. CO. OF TEXAS v. KENNEDY

opinion.h1: MISSOURI, K & T R. CO. OF TEXAS v. KENNEDY, 214 U.S. 502 (1909)
opinion.p: MISSOURI, KANSAS, & TEXAS RAILWAY COMPANY OF TEXAS et al., Plaintiffs in Error, v. S. M. KENNEDY. No. 817.
Messrs. James Hagerman, J. M. Bryson, and A. B. Browne for plaintiffs in error.
Mr. Charles A. Culberson for defendant in error.
